name: Plenty Fine Screen Set
summary: Set of 6 Fine screens for your Plenty Vaporiser.
description: Set of 6 Fine screens for your Plenty Vaporiser. After a while of usage it's best to insert a new screen to enjoy the fresh vapour flavour. Ensure optimal performance with every use. These fine screens guarantee pure and flavorful vapour from your Plenty Vaporiser. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
